published_prior_art.cite: LeeGhassamiShpitser2024DataFusionSelection: general SS-ID soundness covers broader systematic-selection identification; source-cover is a restricted certificate specialization.

LeeGhassamiShpitser2024DataFusionSelection leaves one SS-ID failure case outside proved nonidentification; LeeBareinboim2020PartialObservability and LeeCorreaBareinboim2020GID do not preserve selected source laws plus typed factor-local clauses.
ShpitserPearl2008CompleteID and CorreaTianBareinboim2018Adjustment: known ID/adjustment corners; proposal uses them as sanity reductions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: State explicitly which SS-ID algorithm failure line or subcase is meant by the remaining observational source-overlap branch, so the Stage 0 derivation has a fixed target rather than a prose reference to the Lee-Ghassami-Shpitser gap.
Promote the three-source boundary template into a named corollary or minimal test instance with a nondegenerate positive observable law, even if it remains conditional on Conjecture 1.
Add an explicit mapping from each typed source-cover input to the corresponding systematic-selection data-fusion input, including how partial observed sets and nested/fixing clauses are encoded.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship kernel and Theorems 1-2 as support/sanity obligations.
